name: Ambrosia Squares
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Dream whip dessert topping; prepared
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine together the first three ingredients and press firmly into a 13" x 9-inch pan.
3. Bake for 5 minutes. Cool.
4. Beat cream cheese until smooth. Stir in pudding mix. Gradually add milk, beating slowly until well blended.
5. Fold in clementines and 2 cups toasted coconut.
6. Spoon mixture over baked crust. Spread Dream whip evenly over pudding mixture.
7. Sprinkle with remaining toasted coconut. Chill for 3 hours.
8. Garnish with extra clementines if desired.
